session.transcript_snapshot_note: The transcript is flushed per turn. This snapshot (committed at transcripts/session-da2cac6b.jsonl) ends at 14:23:59Z, during the final long turn; the post-release verification sweep and this bookkeeping step ran inside that turn and are therefore excluded from all token totals below. No token figures are estimated; everything here is summed from per-message usage fields in the committed snapshot.

by_phase.phase: v0.1.0 build (auth, listings, photos, harness v1, infra)
v0.3.0 build+ship (ledger, offers, escrow, property runner)
v0.4.0 build+ship (reviews) + start of verification tail
final verification (v0.2.0 tag rebuild spot-check, full production harness, OAuth device-flow check) and bookkeeping
by_phase.note: ran inside the final turn, after the committed transcript snapshot; excluded from totals — not estimated

by_tool.note: calls and result payload sizes are counted directly from the transcript; result sizes are in characters of the recorded tool_result content (token weight of results is not separately reported by the API — character counts are the measured quantity).

waste_analysis.item: package.json overwrite blocked by not-yet-read guard; had to cat the npm-init file then rewrite it
curl multipart upload smoke test: ';type=image/jpeg' eaten by shell quoting, photo silently rejected; one diagnostic retry with a temp file
waste_analysis.cost: 1 extra tool call cycle, ~2k output tokens

waste_analysis.item: release-log commits re-trigger a full CI deploy of identical code (fly releases v2/v4/v6 deploy the same artifacts as v1/v3/v5)
waste_analysis.cost: 3 redundant CI deploy runs; zero session tokens (runs in GitHub Actions), a few minutes of CI wall clock

waste_analysis.item: pkill-based smoke-server teardown returns exit 144, surfacing three commands as spurious 'errors'

notes: Figures are self-measured by summing per-message usage fields from the committed transcript snapshot; the transcript is the authoritative source for verification.
This bookkeeping step and the session's final message are necessarily excluded from their own totals.
No retry loops, failed CI runs, or dead-end approaches occurred; the harness passed on first run at every release.
